name: rfq-normalizer
description: Normalize any vendor RFQ spreadsheet (xlsx/csv) into MTGI's canonical historical-import template. Auto-detects the header row and drops summary footers, extracts a clean MPN, splits free-text into five typed spec columns, preserves extra vendor columns, normalizes conditions, and fills drive specs with an offline part-number decoder engine (Brave web search as fallback) — emitting a per-cell provenance log and a needs-review report.
